title: carduus hymenolepis
intro: Carduus hymenolepis, also known as Prickly Thistle, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carduus hymenolepis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
